title: Gravity
description: Force that attracts objects with mass

title: Inertia
description: Tendency of an object to resist changes in motion

title: Velocity
description: Speed of an object in a given direction

title: Acceleration

title: Force
description: Interaction that changes motion of an object

title: Energy
description: Capacity to do work

title: Kinetic Energy
description: Energy of motion

title: Potential Energy
description: Stored energy based on position

title: Thermodynamics
description: Study of heat and energy transfer

title: Entropy
description: Measure of disorder in a system

title: Atom
description: Basic unit of matter

title: Molecule
description: Group of atoms bonded together

title: Chemical Reaction
description: Process where substances transform

title: pH
description: Measure of acidity or alkalinity

title: Oxidation
description: Loss of electrons in a reaction

title: Reduction

title: Catalyst

title: Periodic Table
description: Arrangement of chemical elements

title: Bond

title: Solution

title: Cell
description: Basic unit of life

title: DNA

title: RNA
description: Molecule involved in protein synthesis

title: Photosynthesis
description: Process plants use to make energy from light

title: Respiration

title: Evolution

title: Protein

title: Enzyme

title: Ecosystem
description: Community of living organisms and environment

title: Planet

title: Star

title: Galaxy

title: Black Hole

title: Orbit

title: Light Year

title: Universe

title: Comet

title: Solar System
description: System including the sun and orbiting bodies

title: Algorithm
description: Step-by-step problem-solving procedure

title: Data
description: Information processed or stored

title: Variable
description: Storage for a value in programming

title: Function
description: Reusable block of code

title: Loop
description: Structure that repeats instructions

title: Database
description: Organized collection of data

title: API
description: Interface allowing systems to communicate

title: Network
description: Collection of connected devices

title: Machine Learning
description: Systems that learn from data

title: Artificial Intelligence
description: Simulation of human intelligence by machines
